meaning: int.嘘!,肃静!adj.无声的,安静的adv.无声地,安静地n.扑克牌游戏的一种
examples: Why should whist, the name of a card game that has been known only since the 17th century, be spelled with wh -?
Kirsty Williams, the current Lib-Dem candidate, is fighting an energetic campaign, even teaching herself to lamb sheep and play whist to appeal to her diverse constituents.
